cover.era_chip: 日帝 强占 · 1909 · 民族 宗敎
cover.subtitle:
신앙이 곧 항일이 된
다섯 종교의 시대.
cover.imagePrompt: Late-Joseon-to-Japanese-occupation illustration. Dark blue-gray, crimson accent, sepia. ONE Korean Buddhist monk (Han Yong-un) in dark gray robe with shaved head and serene profile, hands clasped, standing in front of a wooden temple gate. Behind him: silhouettes of two figures suggesting different religions — one in white traditional dopo (Cheondogyo) and one with a small cross shape (Catholic). Background: a temple roof and pine trees. Color: dark blue-gray + ink-black, accent of crimson on temple door. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 나철, 대종교 창시. 단군 신앙 기반.
천도교 잡지 개벽 창간. 문화 운동.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 천도교(개벽·어린이·3·1운동), 대종교(중광단·북로군정서), 원불교(박중빈·새생활), 천주교(의민단) 매칭과 한용운의 조선불교 유신론이 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open Korean classical book icon next to a small temple gate silhouette suggesting religious heritage. Cream #F2EDE3 base + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
